introSection: Nia and Animal Coaster (Japanese: ニアとアニマルコースター) is a kiddie roller coaster located at Fuji-Q Highland in Fujiyoshida, Yamanashi, Japan. It was the first Roller Coaster to be based on the Thomas & Friends franchise.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The coaster originally opened with the Thomas Land area as Rock 'N' Roll Duncan (ロックンロールダンカン) in July 1998. It was themed to Narrow Gauge engine Duncan, and his "Rock 'n' Roll" personality, where he sways around. This is replicated where the coaster makes turns and spins.

In 2023, the coaster was given extensive retheming and is now based on Nia, Thomas's Kenyan friend. The exterior of the ride was given an African theme.

fullText:
Nia and Animal Coaster (Japanese: ニアとアニマルコースター) is a kiddie roller coaster located at Fuji-Q Highland in Fujiyoshida, Yamanashi, Japan. It was the first Roller Coaster to be based on the Thomas & Friends franchise.

The coaster originally opened with the Thomas Land area as Rock 'N' Roll Duncan (ロックンロールダンカン) in July 1998. It was themed to Narrow Gauge engine Duncan, and his "Rock 'n' Roll" personality, where he sways around. This is replicated where the coaster makes turns and spins.

In 2023, the coaster was given extensive retheming and is now based on Nia, Thomas's Kenyan friend. The exterior of the ride was given an African theme.
